changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE gdpr_system_article_status_log ( id serial, organization_id integer NOT NULL, system_id integer NOT NULL, article_id integer NOT NULL, paragraph_id integer DEFAULT NULL, owner_id integer DEFAULT NULL, compliance double precision, compliance_metric double precision DEFAULT NULL, due_date timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), comments text, document_link text, document_file_type character varying DEFAULT NULL, document_file_name character varying DEFAULT NULL, document_file_size double precision, CONSTRAINT pk_gdpr_system_article_status_log PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_gdpr_system_article_status_log_to_system FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES systems (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_gdpr_system_article_status_log_to_article FOREIGN KEY (article_id) REFERENCES gdpr_article (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_gdpr_system_article_status_log_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE ); CREATE INDEX i_gdpr_system_article_status_log_to_system ON gdpr_system_article_status_log (system_id); CREATE INDEX i_gdpr_system_article_status_log_to_article ON gdpr_system_article_status_log (article_id); CREATE INDEX i_gdpr_system_article_status_log_to_organization ON gdpr_system_article_status_log (organization_id);
